skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Golden Chip stacks ▲ 50.
skill1.where: resources[0]: { name: goldenChip, initial: 50, min: 0, max: 50 }
skill1.note: Initial 50 stacks set via resource config. ALSO listed in unmodeled.skill1 — that entry is STALE (predates the 2026-07-17 resource-counter landing). The effect IS faithfully represented.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after performing 3 normal attack(s) during Full Burst. Affects self. Golden Chip: Critical Damage ▲ 1.32% continuously, stacks up to 50 time(s).
skill1.where: skill1[0]: passive/self/critDamagePct perResource goldenChip×1.32; cap via resources.max=50; chip generation via skill1[1] resource delta +1 (shotFired, fbGate inFb, everyN 3)
skill1.note: Crit damage is LIVE = goldenChip×1.32 (perResource), not a from-0 ramp. Validated: popup at chips=50 showed crit ×2.160 = (150+50×1.32)/100 exactly. The '3 normals during FB' trigger generates +1 chip (skill1[1] resource effect), same trigger as the AD buff.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after performing 3 normal attack(s) during Full Burst. Affects self and the 1 ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK (except the skill user). Attack Damage ▲ 10.51% for 2 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[1]: shotFired/fbGate inFb/everyN 3/self/attackDamagePct 10.51 2s + resource goldenChip +1; skill1[2]: same trigger/alliesTopAtk count 1 excludeSelf:true/attackDamagePct 10.51 2s
skill1.note: Split into self-block + ally-block. excludeSelf:true fixed 2026-07-17 (alliesTopAtk was silently ignoring it). Board-neutral on soda tb control (grades Soda's own damage, unaffected by the targeting fix).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Burst Stage 3. Affects all allies. Stage 1 (≥10 chips): Full Burst Duration ▲ 2 sec. Stage 2 (≥20 chips): Full Burst Duration ▲ 3 sec. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it (cumulative +2/+5).
skill2.note: APPROXIMATE: flat +4s average instead of chip-gated cumulative (+2s at 10-19 chips, +5s at ≥20). No resourceGate on this block. Caveat documents: late-fight FBs run shorter than modeled (measured last-FB 12.50s at 18-19 chips → real +2s vs sim +4s).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when performing a normal attack during Full Burst. Affects 1 enemy nearest to crosshair. Stage 1 (TE-I): 52.04% ATK damage. Stage 2 (TE-II): 85.02% ATK damage. Cumulative (TE-II state deals 52.04+85.02=137.06%).
skill2.note: APPROXIMATE: 130 is recording-derived Time-Ext-II-dominant average. Datamined cumulative is 137.06%. No TE-state gating modeled (single flat value). Note flags ⚑ rider 130 as recording-derived, to refine on a soda-focus recording.

burst.kitLine: Stage 1: Affects all enemies. Deals 628.7% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: Faithful at L10. Target 'enemy' vs kit 'all enemies' — equivalent in partless-boss scope.

burst.kitLine: Stage 2: Activates when Golden Chip is at 20 or more stacks. Affects self. Hit Rate ▲ 38.91% for 15 sec.
burst.note: Deliberately unmodeled: HR→core is a proven lever but magnitude unmeasured (recon hit_rate_core_test INCONCLUSIVE). Not added despite HRCORE now live, to keep the chip-mechanic change scoped. For SG weapons the core-band interaction is complex.

burst.kitLine: Stage 3: Activates when Golden Chip is at 30 or more stacks. Affects self. ATK ▲ 65.25% for 15 sec.
burst.note: Gate checks PRE-consume chip count (spend happens in burst[2] after gates). Validated: pre-consume 50/43/38… all clear ≥30 for all 5 bursts in the control recording.

burst.kitLine: Golden Chip stacks ▼ 17 after the effect is applied.
burst.note: ALSO listed in unmodeled.burst[0] — that entry is STALE (predates the resource-counter landing). The −17 spend IS faithfully modeled and ordered after the gate checks. Validated vs control.mov drain sequence.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Full Burst extension modeled as flat +4s; kit is chip-gated cumulative (+5s at ≥20, +2s at 10-19). Late-fight FBs run shorter than modeled (measured last-FB 12.50s at 18-19 chips).
documentedConfounds.why: Sim over-extends late FBs by ~2s (gives +4 when reality gives +2 at <20 chips), granting extra in-FB damage time. Directionally consistent with the +2.1% overshoot. Small magnitude (affects only the last 1-2 bursts).

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Hit Rate ▲38.91% for 15s (≥20 chips) unmodeled — proven core-hit-rate lever, magnitude unmeasured (recon INCONCLUSIVE).
documentedConfounds.why: Unmodeled HR would increase real core-hit frequency → real does MORE damage than sim → this effect pushes ratio TOWARD 1.0 (masks the overshoot). If modeled, the underlying overshoot from other sources would be revealed as larger than 2.1%.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ rider flatDamage 130 is recording-derived; datamined cumulative TE-II is 137.06% (52.04+85.02).
documentedConfounds.why: Sim under-models the per-FB-normal rider by ~7% (130 vs 137.06), reducing sim damage → opposes the observed overshoot. Partially masks the true overshoot magnitude.

documentedConfounds.text: SEPARATE ROTATION BUG: sim gives Soda 6 bursts vs recorded 5. Reality's 6th burst would sit at ~20 pre-consume chips (<30, gated out). Suspect B3-alternation cooldown collision or FB-extension-shifted timing.
documentedConfounds.why: Extra burst = extra 628.7% ATK damage + extra ATK buff uptime. Directly inflates sim damage. Note says the old 0.887 was 'FLATTERED; true ~0.82'. May still be active post-resource-landing.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: excludeSelf:true fixed 2026-07-17 for alliesTopAtk. Board-neutral on soda tb control (grades Soda's own damage, unaffected).
documentedConfounds.why: Affects ally targeting, not Soda's own damage. Board-neutral by construction (the board grades Soda's damage only).

documentedConfounds.text: Dynamic Golden-Chip pool LANDED 2026-07-17 — replaces flat crit-42 + every-burst-65.25 derivations. Validated vs control.mov within 1-2 chips.
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved fix, not an open gap. The resource-counter primitive now faithfully tracks the chip economy. Supersedes the note's ⚑ about flat crit-42 being comp-dependent.

documentedConfounds.text: charFixes.reloadFrames 182 (measured padded animation, KEPT). Datamine says 142.
documentedConfounds.why: Deliberate measured override of the datamine value. The 182-frame reload is trace-verified against the control recording. Not a confound — a corrected input.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Soda: Twinkling Bunny as a Golden-Chip resource economy: start 50 (cap 50), +1 per 3 in-FB normals, −17 per burst (post-gate). Crit damage is live perResource (goldenChip×1.32), burst ATK ▲65.25% is gated at ≥30 pre-consume chips. Two deliberate approximations: skill2 FB-extension is a flat +4s (not chip-gated cumulative +2/+5), and the in-FB rider is 130% (recording-derived, vs 137.06% datamined cumulative). Hit Rate ▲38.91% (≥20 chips) is explicitly unmodeled pending HR→core measurement. Two stale unmodeled entries (start-of-battle +50 chips, burst −17 spend) predate the 2026-07-17 resource-counter landing and no longer reflect the override's actual state.
